import React from "react"; import { useQuery } from "react-query"; import { Link } from "react-router-dom"; import { AreaChart, Area, BarChart, Bar, PieChart, Pie, Cell, XAxis, YAxis, CartesianGrid, Tooltip, ResponsiveContainer, Legend } from "recharts"; import { employeeAPI, recruitmentAPI, leaveAPI } from "../utils/api"; import StatsCard from "../components/common/StatsCard"; import { UsersIcon, BriefcaseIcon, CalendarDaysIcon, CurrencyDollarIcon, SparklesIcon } from "@heroicons/react/24/outline"; const COLORS = ["#6366f1","#8b5cf6","#06b6d4","#10b981","#f59e0b"]; const headcountTrend = [{month:"Oct",employees:142},{month:"Nov",employees:148},{month:"Dec",employees:151},{month:"Jan",employees:155},{month:"Feb",employees:159},{month:"Mar",employees:164}]; const deptData = [{dept:"Engineering",count:58},{dept:"Sales",count:32},{dept:"Marketing",count:22},{dept:"Finance",count:18},{dept:"HR",count:12}]; const leaveTypeDist = [{name:"Annual",value:42},{name:"Sick",value:28},{name:"Compensatory",value:15},{name:"Other",value:15}]; export default function Dashboard() { const { data: empStats } = useQuery("empStats", () => employeeAPI.getStats().then(r => r.data.data)); const { data: recStats } = useQuery("recStats", () => recruitmentAPI.getStats().then(r => r.data.data)); const { data: recentLeaves } = useQuery("recentLeaves", () => leaveAPI.getAll({ limit: 5, status: "pending" }).then(r => r.data.data)); return (
